  "findings": [
    "Spring can travel pins (hydrostatic test stops) were not removed after the hydrostatic test was completed."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove all travel pins/stops from the spring hangers to allow the piping system to move freely during thermal expansion and contraction.",
    "Verify that the spring indicators align with the cold settings after pin removal."
  ],
  "rationale": "Spring hangers are designed to support piping during thermal movement. Leaving the travel pins (hydro pins) installed after hydrostatic testing locks the springs, preventing them from absorbing thermal expansion. This can transfer massive, unintended loads to the piping system, equipment nozzles, and structural connections, potentially causing catastrophic failure when the system is brought online.",
  "references": [
    "MSS SP-58",
    "Project Support Standards"
  ]
}
